name: Open-Meteo Air Quality Forecast
description: Location-driven air quality forecast layer for PM and gas concentration trends based on Open-Meteo models.

metadata.label: Open-Meteo Air Quality Forecast
metadata.constraints: Forecast-based environmental layer; verify usage limits and non-commercial terms before production.
metadata.human_summary: Forecast air-quality layer that helps anticipate pollutant conditions in a selected area.
disambiguation_notes: Prefer this for predictive air-quality requests; use OpenAQ for station-based observed measurements.
integration_requirements: No API key required in the free Open-Meteo flow
